name: onboarding-helper
description: Generate comprehensive onboarding documentation and guides for new developers joining your team o...
capabilities: Generates complete onboarding guides with day 1, week 1, and month 1 milestones
Creates development environment setup instructions for any tech stack
Documents team processes, communication channels, and meeting schedules
Produces architecture overviews and codebase structure explanations
Creates first-task tutorials with hands-on exercises
Generates troubleshooting guides and FAQs for common onboarding questions
author: CuriousLearner
securitySummary: Pure documentation skill with no executable code. All 209 static findings are false positives caused by the analyzer misinterpreting example code blocks in markdown documentation as executable patterns. The skill contains only templates and instructions for generating onboarding documentation - no network calls, file system access, or command execution capabilities exist.
valueStatement: New developers often struggle to understand complex projects and team processes. This skill generates comprehensive onboarding guides including environment setup, architecture overviews, first tasks, and team culture documentation tailored to your project.
userTitle: Create onboarding documentation for new developers
limitations: Does not execute code or modify your actual project files
Cannot access your existing documentation to read current state
Requires you to provide project details for personalized output
Generates templates that you must review and customize

useCases.title: Standardize team onboarding
useCases.description: Create consistent onboarding documentation for all new engineers joining your team or company.

useCases.title: Document project architecture
useCases.description: Generate architecture overviews and codebase walkthroughs that help new developers understand your system.

useCases.title: Create setup guides
useCases.description: Produce detailed environment setup instructions that reduce time-to-productivity for new team members.

promptTemplates.title: Full Onboarding Guide
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate a comprehensive onboarding guide for our [PROJECT_NAME] project. Include: overview with technology stack, day 1 checklist with environment setup steps, week 1 goals covering architecture basics, month 1 milestones, team structure and contacts, communication channels, and first-week resources.

promptTemplates.title: Quick Start Guide
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a quick-start onboarding document for [PROJECT_NAME]. Focus on essential setup steps, required accounts and access, basic architecture overview, first commit task with step-by-step instructions, and key contacts for help.

promptTemplates.title: Architecture Overview
promptTemplates.prompt: Generate an architecture overview document for [PROJECT_NAME]. Include: high-level system diagram description, technology stack breakdown, key services and their responsibilities, data flow explanations, and directory structure with purpose of each major folder.

promptTemplates.title: Team Process Guide
promptTemplates.prompt: Create a team processes guide for our engineering team. Include: git workflow and branch naming conventions, code review practices, deployment process and environments, meeting schedules and purposes, communication channels and when to use each, and on-call rotation information.

bestPractices: Provide specific project details like team size, tech stack, and contact names for more personalized guides
Review and customize generated templates to match your actual team processes and culture
Pair generated documentation with hands-on exercises and pair programming sessions
antiPatterns: Do not share sensitive credentials or production access keys in generated documentation
Avoid generating documentation without verifying accuracy against current team practices
Do not skip the FAQ section as it addresses common new developer pain points

faq.question: Which AI tools are compatible with this skill?
faq.answer: This skill works with Claude, Codex, and Claude Code. It requires no additional configuration or API keys.

faq.question: What information should I provide for the best results?
faq.answer: Share project name, tech stack, team size, development workflow, key contacts, and any existing documentation you want incorporated.

faq.question: Can I customize the output format?
faq.answer: Yes. You can specify focus areas, document types, and length preferences. The skill generates markdown that can be converted to any format.

faq.question: Is my project data kept private?
faq.answer: The skill only processes information you provide during the conversation. No data is stored or shared outside your session.

faq.question: Why should I use this instead of writing documentation manually?
faq.answer: The skill provides structured templates and comprehensive outlines that reduce initial writing time while ensuring you cover all essential topics.

faq.question: How does this compare to hiring a technical writer?
faq.answer: This skill accelerates initial documentation creation with templates and structure. A technical writer adds editorial refinement, user research, and ongoing maintenance expertise.
